# cMap / connectivity

::: {.lang-en}
Up/down DEG signatures queried against L2S2. Rows are perturbagens ranked by adjusted *p*-value; `score` is the odds ratio.
:::

::: {.lang-ko}
Up / down DEG signature를 L2S2에 Query한 결과. 각 행은 조정 *p*-value로 정렬된 perturbagen, `score`는 odds ratio.
:::

````{r dr-child-template, include=FALSE}
dr_child_template <- r"---(
## `r cid`

```{r dr-input-signature, results='asis'}
if (is_html_report()) {
  cat("\n\n<details>\n")
  cat("<summary><strong>L2S2 input gene signatures</strong></summary>\n\n")
} else {
  cat("\n\n### L2S2 input gene signatures\n\n")
}
if (!isTRUE(cmap_enabled)) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("cMap / L2S2 stage disabled in config.yaml.")))
} else if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("DE results unavailable; L2S2 input signature cannot be reconstructed.")))
} else {
  df <- de_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gene_name), !is.na(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj), nzchar(as.character(gene_name))) |>
    dplyr::arrange(padj)

  up_tbl <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(log2FoldChange > 0) |>
    dplyr::distinct(gene_name, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_up) |>
    dplyr::mutate(direction = "up", input_rank = dplyr::row_number())

  down_tbl <- df |>
    dplyr::filter(log2FoldChange < 0) |>
    dplyr::distinct(gene_name, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_down) |>
    dplyr::mutate(direction = "down", input_rank = dplyr::row_number())

  sig_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(up_tbl, down_tbl) |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(c(
      "direction", "input_rank", "gene_id", "gene_name",
      "log2FoldChange", "pvalue", "padj"
    )))

  if (nrow(sig_tbl) == 0) {
    cat(as.character(no_results("No L2S2 input genes selected from DE results.")))
  } else {
    sig_counts <- table(factor(sig_tbl$direction, levels = c("up", "down")))
    dt <- report_table(
      sig_tbl,
      rownames = FALSE,
      filter = "top",
      caption = sprintf(
        "L2S2 input signature: %d up / %d down genes ranked by padj",
        as.integer(sig_counts[["up"]]),
        as.integer(sig_counts[["down"]])
      ),
      extensions = "Buttons",
      options = list(
        pageLength = 25,
        lengthMenu = c(25, 50, 100, 250, 500),
        scrollX = TRUE,
        dom = "Blfrtip",
        buttons = c("csv", "copy")
      ),
      signif_cols = intersect(c("log2FoldChange", "pvalue", "padj"), names(sig_tbl)),
      digits = 3
    )
    cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
  }
  cat("\n\n")
}
if (is_html_report()) cat("\n</details>\n\n")
```

### L2S2 hits

```{r dr-l2s2-hits, results='asis', fig.width=8.5, fig.height=8}
hits_path <- file.path(project_root, "results", "cmap", cid,
                       "l2s2_hits.tsv")
hits <- safe_read(hits_path, sep = "\t")
if (!isTRUE(cmap_enabled)) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("cMap / L2S2 stage disabled in config.yaml.")))
} else if (is.null(hits) || nrow(hits) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("L2S2 query returned no hits (or call failed; see log).")))
} else {
  top <- hits |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(score %||% 0)), fdr) |>
    head(30) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = ifelse(is.na(perturbagen) | !nzchar(as.character(perturbagen)),
                     paste0("row_", dplyr::row_number()),
                     as.character(perturbagen)),
      label = factor(label, levels = rev(label))
    )
  if (nrow(top) > 0 && any(!is.na(top$score))) {
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(top, ggplot2::aes(x = score, y = label,
                                           fill = ifelse(score > 1, "induce",
                                                         "reverse"))) +
      ggplot2::geom_col() +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c(induce = "#e67e22",
                                            reverse = "#2c7bb6"),
                                 name = "direction") +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed",
                          colour = "grey40") +
      ggplot2::labs(x = "odds ratio (score)", y = NULL,
                    title = "Top 30 perturbagens") +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 6, 6)
      )
    print(p)
    cat("\n\n")
  }

  dt <- report_table(
    head(hits, 500),
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter   = "top",
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options  = list(pageLength = 10, lengthMenu = c(10, 25, 50, 100), scrollX = TRUE, dom = "Blfrtip",
                    buttons = c("csv", "copy")),
    signif_cols = intersect(c("score", "pvalue", "fdr"), names(hits)),
    digits  = 3
  )
  cat(knitr::knit_print(dt))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

)---"
````

```{r dr-render, results='asis'}
if (nrow(contrasts) == 0) {
  print(no_results("No contrasts defined in contrasts.tsv."))
}

cmap_enabled <- isTRUE(cfg$cmap$enabled %||% TRUE)

for (cid in contrasts$contrast_id) {
  de_tbl <- safe_read(file.path(project_root, "results", "de", cid, "deseq2_results.csv"))
  
  env <- new.env(parent = globalenv())
  env$cid          <- cid
  env$project_root <- project_root
  env$safe_read    <- safe_read
  env$no_results   <- no_results
  env$de_tbl       <- de_tbl
  env$cmap_enabled <- cmap_enabled
  env$top_up       <- cfg$cmap$top_up %||% 250
  env$top_down     <- cfg$cmap$top_down %||% 250
  env$`%||%`       <- `%||%`

  out <- knitr::knit_child(
    text  = dr_child_template,
    envir = env,
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  cat(out, sep = "\n")
}
```
